ksa_text: Skill in conducting user needs and requirements analysis for data and AI initiatives, including stakeholder interviews, requirements gathering, workflow analysis, and pain point identification.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Operations & Program Management is not a standard competency expectation for VP Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Operations & Program Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
